lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Oh! Take that horrid thing off your head immediately!

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: You're not going into deeper water with that bowl.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you like my helmet?

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: My sister was once trapped in one of those for a long time by your kind. It was awful and she's still terrified of them. We don't allow them beyond this point anymore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What shall I do with it?

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Put it on the pile over there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But how will I breathe?

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Breathing is for pesky humans.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. I am one.

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Oops. Nevermind. I'm sure you'll manage. Just look for bubbles.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: I'm Mairin, one of the many merfolk here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Many? I don't see that many...

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Just because you don't see us, doesn't mean we're not there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's kind of creepy. What do you actually do?

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Mostly stop people entering beyond this wreck with those horrid fishbowls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I breathe underwater without a helmet.

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Just find some bubbles, or other sources of air.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Other sources?

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Yes, some fish can be a good source of air too..

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything I can do to help you?

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Yes! You can collect the tears of my poor trapped sister.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? Tears? But, they're water, surely underwater they would...

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: She's a mermaid, like me. Didn't you know our tears are the pearls of the sea? You humans.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, keep your scales on. Where would I find these tears?

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: They usually end up secreted in clams or other places.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I get out of it?

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: Well, I have access to a lot of old stuff that's fallen down under the water, so I'm sure I could reward you in some way.

lines.speaker: Mairin
lines.text: If you find any special glistening tears, I can teach you some useful Agility and Thieving techniques too. So will you help me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nah. Not for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you got to trade?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye.
